1. Yes - A white crescent-moon + play-button icon is visible at the top-center, accompanied by "NEW IMAGE WATERMARK" text below it.  
2. Yes - The watermark is positioned at the top of the frame.  
3. Yes - The watermark is horizontally centered.  
4. Yes - It is subtle, as it is small and does not dominate the scene.  
5. Yes - The white icon contrasts sharply with the dark twilight background, making it stand out.  
6. No - There are no visual issues like clipping, distortion, blurriness, or rendering artifacts.  

VERDICT: PASS  
The watermark is a small, centered white crescent-moon + play-button icon at the top of the frame, with "NEW IMAGE WATERMARK" text below it. It is subtle, contrasts well with the dark background, and has no visual defects.
